name: rmo-copilot-fr-CA
description: French (Canadian) label + locale + renderer overrides peer for the rmo-copilot skillbox. Ships on disk alongside the English primary; stays dormant unless SKILLBOX_ENABLE=rmo-copilot-fr-CA is set so the default demo deploy stays in English. Overrides all five rmo-copilot tool-result renderers: draft_timesheet + draft_dvir + summarize_pay_period + web_research + lookup_regulations. The lookup_regulations override translates the renderer chrome only; KB excerpts stay en-CA until a fr-CA RAG corpus surfaces.
